title: Brad Anderson

|nationality=[[Wikipedia:Canadians|Canadian]]<ref name="Image profile">{{WebCite|url=https://imagecomics.com/creators/brad-anderson|title=Brad Anderson|work=[[Wikipedia:Image Comics|Image Comics]]|accessdate=2025-12-19|archivedate=20241217132947}}</ref>

{{Quote|A colorist basically takes the black and white art, scans it in and adds color to the black and white art in a program called Photoshop. Brad Anderson, our colorist on Star Wars, is an example of an excellent colorist who can deal with any of the effects we come up with, even the washes and rendered grayscale work, which is very tricky to color.|[[Dan Parsons]]|<ref name="Clone Warz Interview">{{WebCite|url=https://www.starwarz.com/clonewarseu/features/interviews/danparsons.htm|text=DAN PARSONS INTERVIEW|work=The Unofficial Clone Wars Site|author=Brian Gates|archivedate=20040219162109}}</ref>}}
'''Brad Anderson''', also known under the pseudonym '''Joe Wayne''',<ref>{{DarkHorse|url=Blog/32/enduring-legacy-end-star-wars-legacy-randy-stradle|text=A Star Wars Friday Special! The End of Star Wars: Legacy by Randy Stradley and Freddye Lins}}</ref> is a colorist artist who has created covers for the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Legacy]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series. He is from [[Wikipedia:Kenora|Kenora]], [[Wikipedia:Ontario|Ontario]], and he attended [[Wikipedia:The Kubert School|The Joe Kubert School of Cartoon and Graphic Art, Inc.]] in [[Wikipedia:New Jersey|New Jersey]].<ref name="Image profile" />

{{Artist-stub}}
